questions.question: Explain how graph coloring is used in university exam scheduling with an example.
expectedPoints: Edges represent student conflicts between courses
Example with 4-5 courses and conflict pattern

questions.question: Discuss the application of graph coloring in register allocation during compiler optimization. Include the concept of 'liveness analysis' and how it creates the interference graph.
expectedPoints: Role of liveness analysis in identifying variable conflicts
Graph coloring approach to register assignment
Spilling handling when registers are insufficient
